description: LaTeX math rendering: inline $...$ and display $$...$$ math, fractions, integrals, summations, matrices, Greek letters, subscripts/superscripts, limits
visual_assertions: Inline math expressions should be rendered inline within text paragraphs
Display math ($$...$$) expressions should be centered on their own line with extra vertical space
Fraction expressions should show a numerator over a denominator separated by a horizontal bar
Integral expressions should show the integral sign (∫) with limits above and below
Summation should show the sigma (Σ) symbol with n=1 below and infinity above
Matrix expressions should show a grid of values enclosed in parentheses or brackets
Greek letters (α, β, γ, etc.) should appear as their correct Unicode glyphs
Subscripts should appear smaller and below the baseline (e.g., x₁, x₂)
Superscripts should appear smaller and above the baseline (e.g., x²)
The limit expression should show 'lim' with 'x→0' below it
